# Conditions

To qualify for a refund or return, the item must be unused, in its original, complete packaging, and accompanied by the original proof of purchase (e-invoice or order number). Items that are defective or damaged in transit are exempt from these conditions; see damaged-items for details.

[Source: refunds_returns.md#conditions]
